org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
 
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.

    Instrumenter
    Instrumenter.withFrequencyType(FrequencyType frequencyType)
    Indicates if the frequency is defined in terms of the number of evaluations or number of steps (iterations).
